steps.title: Calculate weekly savings amount
steps.content:
Maria saves $\frac{3}{7}$ of 224 dollars each week. Multiply:
$$\frac{3}{7} \times 224 = \frac{672}{7} = 96$$
Maria saves 96 dollars per week.

steps.title: Multiply by 8 weeks
steps.content:
Total savings over 8 weeks at 96 dollars per week:
$$96 \times 8 = 768$$
The answer is 768 dollars.
